{{Infobox madra
| name = Blood aura
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Blood aura Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Blood [[aura]] is a legendary power associated with the [[Arelius bloodline]]. It is characterized by its intense strength, capable of twisting light and affecting living bodies directly. This [[aura]] has a particular affinity for flesh; when combined with fire madra, it can cause bodies to burn as easily as dry wood. It is also noted for its ability to control the blood within a person, which can lead to physical damage such as skin tearing or blood bursting through the surface. In combat and spiritual practice, blood [[aura]] is often used in conjunction with other energies like [[madra]], [[soulfire]], and [[sword aura]] to create complex techniques. It is a vital component in the maintenance and evolution of a [[Blood Shadow]], a spiritual parasite that can be fed with blood [[aura]], [[life]] [[aura]], and [[soulfire]] to take on more powerful or even bestial forms. The power can be extremely overwhelming, capable of drowning out other energies and even appearing as massive, cloud-like formations in the sky. Natural treasures like the [[Heart]]'s Gem serve as ultimate sources of this [[aura]], which can be harvested from powerful entities or [[sacred beasts]].}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|A blood [[aura]] was choking the air at [[Lastleaf Fortress]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Blood aura]] is a type of [[aura]] that can flood the air and affect flesh.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1">''Ghostwater'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Blood aura]] can cover a horizon like a cloud bank.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Certain meats can increase the density of blood [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|A blood artist can cause a spike in blood [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] has an unmatched connection to blood [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] uses blood [[aura]] to fight.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A giant's body contains a blood [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruby]] cycles a blood [[aura]] from the [[Heart]]'s Gem.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A blood [[aura]] can seize a person's heart.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The blood [[aura]] was intense enough to cause bleeding from the eyes and scratches.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The blood [[aura]] in the [[labyrinth]] has not been sipped away by hunger.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The massive body of the creature was full of blood [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] has been replenishing her spirit with blood [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon]] commands blood [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The blood [[aura]] in the air can attempt to kill people.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] used blood [[aura]] to make the flying lizard shudder.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] incorporates blood [[aura]] into her cycling technique.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Blood aura]] can be used to stop regeneration.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
